notes: Motion-icon overhaul: morse-code visualization for every gesture. Clicks are dots, holds are bars, compounds concatenate in the order performed. So tap=●, double-tap=●●, hold=▬, click+hold=●▬ (amber), hold+click=▬● (amber), 3-tap+hold=●●●▬, hold+2-tap=▬●●, etc. Fixes: (1) click+hold and hold+click families used to show NOTHING because the icon table only covered 1c..5c, hold, lh; (2) replaces the half-filled circle ◐ for hold with a clean dash glyph; (3) rotation-burst icon was silently broken because /\\d+/ in a C++ raw string matches literal '\\d+' not digits — switched to /[0-9]+/. Adds length-based scaling so 5c+h (6 chars) still fits the column.
